name: 100 hidden Cthulhu fish 2
developer: Sons of Welder, FM Simple Games Studio
publisher: Sons of Welder, FM Simple Games Studio
short_description: 100 hidden Cthulhu fish 2 is a hidden objects / clicker game. There are 100 fish hiding on each map. Your task is to find them all
detailed_description:
Our other interesting games







About the Game



100 hidden Cthulhu fish 2 is a hidden objects/ clicker game.

The game is loosely inspired by motifs from the world created by H. P. Lovecraft, decorated with hand-drawn humorous graphics.

There are 100 fish hiding on each map. Your task is to find them all. There are two maps in total, which gives a total of 200 fish to find (wow!).

There are many games in which we look for hidden cats, but have you ever looked for the grotesque fish that Cthulhu himself hid?

- bigger maps !
- 2 levels
- 200 funny smelly fish
- hand-drawn graphics
- progress record



controls :

left mouse button - click on the fish

mouse scroll wheel - zoom in/out

hold down the right mouse button - map navigation
